facts.claim: 77 rules cover multi-professional evolution forms (11 roles: medico, enfermagem, tecnico_enfermagem, fisioterapeuta, farmaceutico, fonoaudiologo, musicoterapeuta, nutricionista, psicologo, terapeuta, intercorrencia): dynamic form engine, doc lifecycle with signing (Cryptocubo) and release to Tasy/AMH Docs, carry-forward of previous form/vitals/24h indicators.

SOFA (escore_sofa, 0-24) is an opaque pre-computed value; no sub-score formula exists here though component labs/vitals (creatinina, bilirrubinas, plaquetas, glasgow, pas/pad, po2/paco2/fio2, temperatura, FC) are present.
Lifecycle salvo(draft,default)->liberado(signed)->inativo(voided); confirmed against BE model, correcting a Phase-1 'rascunho' guess.

Tasy release uses hardcoded tipo->code map (medico=1151, enfermagem=1203, fisioterapeuta=1251, terapeuta=5, nutricionista=1133, psicologo=1131, musicoterapeuta=2332, fonoaudiologo=1121, intercorrencia=2584); tecnico_enfermagem excluded.
Signing needs CPF+PIN, release needs CPF; inativo evolutions immutable; only original author may edit a non-inactive evolution regardless of liberado state.
Form engine (Campo/CampoType) has 11 field types with required/min/max/regex/mask + 'conditions' show-if map, plus group-level 'anulavel' (soft-void, nulls data on submit rather than deleting).

Status: OK=61, DISCREPANCY=9, AMBIGUOUS=7 (77 total). Type: validation=29, workflow=27, decision-tree=15, threshold=2, eligibility=2, scoring=1, formula=1. Category: care-pathway=36, data-validation=34, clinical-scoring=4, billing-administrative=2, triage-eligibility=1. verdict: NOT_APPLICABLE=72, UNVERIFIABLE=4, DISCREPANCY=1 (no rule verified). No escalation bands in shard.

constraints.text: MUST preserve 3-state lifecycle, author-only-edit, no-edit-when-void; MUST NOT allow inactivating a released record silently (legacy destroy() skips its own guard, RULE-EVOLUCOES-030).
MUST NOT port RULE-EVOLUCOES-025 (dt_assinatura stamped from dt_registro, not real signing timestamp) -- record the true signing moment.

RASS and encounter-number MUST use one canonical type platform-wide -- legacy has RASS number vs string (RULE-EVOLUCOES-003), encounter id number/numero_atendimento vs string/nr_atendimento (RULE-EVOLUCOES-075).

open_questions: RULE-EVOLUCOES-057: required field excluded from Meta.fields in all action variants -- live bug or suppressed elsewhere? needs runtime check.
RULE-EVOLUCOES-017/018: get_pk on BalancoHidrico and Empresa-instance-vs-pk mismatch unresolved without out-of-partition model files.

load_bearing_rules.what: SOFA field opaque pre-computed, no local formula
dt_assinatura from dt_registro, not signing timestamp
Canonical lifecycle; FE/BE reconciled, no drift

systemic_issues.issue: Type drift, same clinical concept across models
Read vs write lookup asymmetry + inverted conditional logic
Authoritative timestamp discarded for stale field

notes: Full catalog (2687 lines / 77 rules) read end-to-end. Load-bearing subset only; disposition agents get the full shard.
